age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 37 years Age as on 15 June 2026. Age relaxation will be as per the rules of the funding agency.

qualification.education_qualification: First Class Graduation in Psychology or any branch of Psychology, First Class Masters in Psychology or any branch of Psychology, Ph.D Psychology or any branch of Psychology
qualification.details: First Class Graduation in Psychology or any branch of Psychology. First Class Masters in Psychology or any branch of Psychology. Ph.D Psychology or any branch of Psychology.

salary_details.details: Salary will be as per the Funding agency.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist-I Non-medical Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist-I Non-medical recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist-I Non-medical recruitment is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Research Scientist-I Non-medical post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Research Scientist-I Non-medical post at AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a First Class Graduation, First Class Masters, or a Ph.D. in Psychology or any of its branches.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Project Research Scientist-I Non-medical position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Research Scientist-I Non-medical position is 37 years as of 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for the AIIMS Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for the Project Research Scientist-I Non-medical post?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is contract-based.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection criteria for the Project Research Scientist-I Non-medical role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist-I Non-medical post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Research Scientist-I Non-medical post will be as per the norms of the funding agency.
